message.content:
import { Map, Swords, Trophy, Target, Shield, Sparkles } from 'lucide-react'
import { Callout } from '@/components/mdx/Callout'
import { Card, CardGrid } from '@/components/mdx/CardGrid'
import { Checklist } from '@/components/mdx/Checklist'
import { FAQ } from '@/components/mdx/FAQ'
import { Steps, Step } from '@/components/mdx/Steps'
import { Section } from '@/components/mdx/Section'
import { YouTubeEmbed } from '@/components/mdx/YouTubeEmbed'

export const metadata = {
  title: "Anime Paradox Eternal Units: Maximize Your Power 2026",
  description: "Unleash the full potential of your Anime Paradox Eternal Units. Learn how to acquire, evolve, and optimize these powerful characters to dominate any challenge in 2026.",
  category: "Guide",
  image: "https://placehold.co/800x400/8B5CF6/fff?text=Anime+Paradox+Eternal+Units",
  date: "2026-02-01",
  author: "Anime Paradox Wiki Team"
}

<Callout type="info" title="Quick Guide">
- **Eternal Units** are characters equipped with the rare 0.1% **Eternal trait**, granting immense power.
- Focus on **Udyu**, **Asta Devil**, and **Neleotus** for early-game Eternal unit evolution.
- **Trait Rerolls** are crucial for obtaining the Eternal trait; farm them from Raids, Sieges, and Milestones.
- **Evolution materials** like Green Essences and specific craftables are needed to ascend units.
- Prioritize **S+ Tier DPS units** with the Eternal trait for late-game content, such as **Storrk** or **Zid**.
</Callout>

In the dynamic world of Anime Paradox, assembling a formidable team of units is key to conquering challenges and climbing the ranks. Among the most coveted assets are the **Anime Paradox Eternal Units**, characters imbued with the incredibly rare and powerful "Eternal" trait. This unique trait transforms already strong units into absolute powerhouses, offering significant boosts to damage, range, and overall utility. Understanding how to acquire, evolve, and strategically deploy these units is paramount for any player aiming for endgame dominance in 2026.

This comprehensive guide will delve into everything you need to know about Eternal Units, from identifying top-tier candidates to the meticulous process of evolving them and optimizing their performance. Prepare to unlock unprecedented power and reshape your gameplay experience with these legendary units.

<Section icon={Sparkles} title="Understanding Eternal Units: The Power of Eternity">

Eternal Units aren't a separate class of characters but rather specific units that have acquired the **Eternal trait**, a 0.1% rarity trait that significantly amplifies their capabilities. This trait grants substantial buffs, often including infinite range, increased damage, and unique passive abilities that make them indispensable for tackling high-difficulty content, especially bosses and large waves of enemies. Identifying which units benefit most from this trait and how to leverage their enhanced skills is crucial for strategic play.

**Video Highlights:**
- Showcases the evolution of several unique Eternal units.
- Highlights specific units like Udyu, Asta Devil, Neleotus, and Idol.
- Discusses their individual strengths (AoE, boss damage, support).

<YouTubeEmbed videoId="hwUEFaMKrUA" title="I SPENT 24 HOURS EVOLVING THESE INSANE UNIQUE ETERNAL UNITS IN* Anime Paradox" />

Early access players have already identified several units that, when equipped with the Eternal trait, become game-changers. These units are often chosen for their inherent strengths which are then drastically amplified by the Eternal trait's effects. For instance, units with strong AoE attacks become even more devastating, while single-target DPS units can melt bosses in record time.

<Callout type="tip" title="Strategic Unit Selection">
While the Eternal trait can make any unit stronger, it truly shines on units with strong base kits. Prioritize applying the Eternal trait to units that already excel in specific roles like AoE damage, boss killing, or support, as their amplified abilities will provide maximum impact.
</Callout>

Below is a breakdown of key units frequently discussed for their potential as powerful Eternal Units, based on community insights and early gameplay.

| Unit Name | Primary Role | Key Trait/Ability (with Eternal) | Notes |
| :-------- | :----------- | :------------------------------- | :---- |
| **Udyu** | AoE DPS / Boss Killer | Quincy Successor, Arrow Volley, Still Silver | Extremely cheap placement cost (500), absurd damage scaling, great against bosses and waves. |
| **Asta Devil** | Boss Killer / Debuffer | Dark Slash, Shield Breaker, Buff Removal | High damage output, expensive, removes enemy buffs, good for tough bosses. |
| **Neleotus** | AoE Clear / Damage | Large AoE Range, Burn Application, Dash-Slash | Excellent for clearing multiple enemies, applies burn damage, relatively cheap to upgrade. |
| **Idol Pop** | Support / Healer | Blessing, Hype Overdrive, Damage/CDR Buffs | Provides significant AoE healing, buffs allies' damage and cooldown reduction, essential for team sustain. |
| **Storrk (Resurreccion)** | S+ Tier DPS | Metralleta (full-map AoE), Absurd health/range | Highest overall DPS, extremely rare, expensive to build, devastating wave clear. |
| **Zid (Atomic)** | S+ Tier DPS | Full-map AoE, Massive tankiness | High damage ceiling, heavy investment, excels in long runs. |

</Section>

<Section icon={Target} title="Acquiring & Evolving Your Eternal Units">

The journey to obtaining and evolving **Anime Paradox Eternal Units** involves several critical steps: summoning the base unit, gathering specific evolution materials, and crucially, rerolling for the elusive Eternal trait. This process requires patience, strategic resource management, and a bit of luck.

**Video Highlights:**
- Details various methods to farm trait rerolls, including milestones, battle pass, quests, and endgame modes.
- Emphasizes the importance of daily and weekly challenges for consistent reroll gains.
- Mentions the 0.1% rarity of the Eternal trait.

<YouTubeEmbed videoId="zLxEVNOPP4Q" title="Get ETERNAL *FAST* & REROLLS In Anime Paradox!" />

The most challenging aspect is often securing enough **Trait Rerolls** to eventually land the 0.1% Eternal trait. While the odds are low, consistent farming across all available game modes will significantly increase your chances.

<Steps>
  <Step num="1" title="Obtain a Base Unit">
    Units can be summoned from rotating banners using Gems. While any unit can theoretically get the Eternal trait, focus on acquiring high-tier Mythic or Secret units that already possess strong abilities. Visit the Summon Area in the lobby or use the Summon icon on your screen.
  </Step>
  <Step num="2" title="Gather Evolution Materials">
    Many powerful units require specific materials to evolve, which are often crafted from essences or dropped from challenging game modes. For example, **Asta** needs a **Clover Leaf** (crafted from 30 Green Essences), and **Idol** also requires 30 Green Essences. **Kilua** needs a **Yo-Yo**, and **Itachi** an **Eye**. These materials are crucial for unlocking their evolved forms and higher stats.
  </Step>
  <Step num="3" title="Perform Evolution">
    Once you have the necessary materials, head to the Ascension area (often behind the summon area) to evolve your units. Evolution significantly boosts a unit's base stats and unlocks new abilities, making them prime candidates for the Eternal trait.
  </Step>
  <Step num="4" title="Reroll for the Eternal Trait">
    This is where the real grind begins. Use **Trait Rerolls** on your evolved unit until you hit the 0.1% chance for the Eternal trait. This can take many attempts, so stockpile your rerolls. The game offers various sources for these precious items.
  </Step>
</Steps>

Here's a breakdown of common evolution materials for frequently sought-after units:

| Unit Name | Required Evolution Material | Essence Cost (Example) | Acquisition Method |
| :-------- | :------------------------- | :--------------------- | :----------------- |
| **Asta** | Clover Leaf | 30 Green Essences | Crafting |
| **Idol** | (Specific item, similar cost) | 30 Green Essences | Crafting |
| **Kilua** | Yo-Yo | Varies | Crafting |
| **Itachi** | Eye | Varies | Crafting |
| **Neleotus** | (Specific item) | Varies | Crafting |
| **Udyu** | (Specific item) | Varies | Crafting |

</Section>

<Section icon={Trophy} title="Optimizing Your Eternal Unit Lineup">

Once you've successfully acquired and evolved your **Anime Paradox Eternal Units**, the next step is to optimize their performance through strategic placement, team synergy, and consistent trait rerolling. Even with the Eternal trait, proper utilization can significantly impact your success in various game modes.

Farming **Trait Rerolls** is an ongoing process, even after obtaining an Eternal unit, as you might want to optimize secondary traits or aim for the Eternal trait on more units. Understanding the most efficient sources is key to a continuous power climb.

| Trait Reroll Source | Quantity (Approx.) | Frequency | Difficulty | Notes |
| :------------------ | :----------------- | :-------- | :--------- | :---- |
| **Story Milestones** | 2-15+ per map | One-time | Easy to Hard | Completing acts on Nightmare, Wave 25/50 on Infinite. |
| **Battle Pass** | Varies (e.g., 20) | Seasonal | Easy to Medium | Paid option, offers double rewards, includes shiny units. |
| **Weekly Quests** | 1-20 | Weekly | Medium | Can vary, often includes specific tasks. |
| **Daily Challenges** | 3 | Daily | Easy | Consistent daily income, also provides essences. |
| **Level Milestones** | 5-50 | One-time | Progression | Rewards for reaching specific player levels (e.g., Level 50, 150). |
| **Raid Mode Store** | 100 | Daily (potential) | Hard (Endgame) | Buyable from the Raid store, may restock every 24 hours. |
| **Siege Mode Store** | 100 | Weekly | Hard (Endgame) | Buyable from the Siege store, refreshes weekly. |
| **Login Rewards** | 5-35 | Daily/Monthly | Easy | Day 7 and Day 30 often provide rerolls. |

<CardGrid cols={2}>
  <Card title="Optimal Placement">
    - **AoE Units (Neleotus, Udyu):** Place them centrally or at choke points to maximize their wide-range attacks. Consider elevated positions for better line of sight.
    - **Boss Killers (Asta Devil, Storrk):** Position them where they can focus fire on elite enemies and bosses without getting distracted by small fry.
    - **Support (Idol Pop):** Ensure your support unit's healing and buff range covers your main DPS units. Central placement is often ideal.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Team Synergy">
    - **Healer + DPS:** Pair Idol Pop with high-HP Eternal DPS units to keep them alive and buff their damage.
    - **Buffer + Scaler:** Units like Sun Jin Wu (Monarch) benefit greatly from attack speed or damage buffs from other supports.
    - **Crowd Control:** Include units with stun or slow abilities to keep enemies grouped for your Eternal AoE units.
  </Card>
</CardGrid>

<Callout type="warning" title="Avoid Reroll Pitfalls">
Do not waste your valuable Trait Rerolls on low-tier units or units you don't plan to evolve. The 0.1% chance for the Eternal trait is extremely low, so ensure every reroll counts by using it on your strongest, fully evolved units.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Swords} title="Top Eternal Unit Tier List & Strategies">

While the "Eternal" trait can elevate any unit, certain characters stand out as exceptional choices due to their inherent abilities synergizing perfectly with the trait's benefits. This section combines insights from general unit tier lists with specific observations about **Anime Paradox Eternal Units** from experienced players.

| Unit Name | Base Tier (DPS/Support) | Key Strengths (Pre-Eternal) | Notes (with Eternal Trait) |
| :-------- | :---------------------- | :--------------------------- | :------------------------- |
| **Storrk (Resurreccion)** | S+ DPS | Best overall DPS, absurd health/range, Metralleta wave clear | Becomes an unparalleled force, capable of erasing waves and heavily damaging bosses across the map. |
| **Zid (Atomic)** | S+ DPS | Full-map AoE, massive tankiness, highest damage ceiling | Transforms into an unstoppable juggernaut, clearing entire maps and surviving extreme damage. |
| **Sun Jin Wu (Monarch)** | S DPS | Insane scaling, executes enemies, thrives in Infinite modes | His on-kill scaling combined with Eternal's boosts makes him an Infinite mode MVP, growing stronger indefinitely. |
| **Udyu** | High DPS | Cheap placement, strong AoE, boss damage | His already absurd damage is amplified, making him a top-tier choice for both early and late-game content. |
| **Asta Devil** | A Support (Tier List) / High DPS (Players) | Unique debuffs, anti-shield utility, high burst damage | Becomes a focused boss-killing machine, especially against shielded enemies, with increased range and damage. |
| **Idol (Pop)** | S+ Support | AOE healing, damage/CDR buffs | Her support capabilities are enhanced, providing consistent, wide-area healing and crucial buffs to the entire team. |
| **Igrus (Elite Knight)** | S DPS | Strong bleed damage, self-healing, SJW synergy | Excellent secondary DPS, benefits from Eternal's damage boost, especially in synergy with Sun Jin Wu. |
| **Ichuga (Vasto Lorde)** | S DPS | Massive bleed DPS, self-sustain, tankiness | A durable DPS unit whose bleed effects become even more potent with Eternal's damage amplification. |

<Callout type="success" title="Endgame Dominance">
With a fully optimized Eternal Unit lineup, you'll find yourself breezing through content that once seemed insurmountable. The sheer power and utility these units provide make the grind for the Eternal trait well worth the effort.
</Callout>

To truly dominate the endgame, a clear progression path for your **Anime Paradox Eternal Units** is essential.

<Checklist
  id="eternal-unit-goals"
  title="Endgame Eternal Unit Goals:"
  items={[
    "Acquire a base S+ or S tier DPS unit (e.g., Storrk, Zid, Sun Jin Wu).",
    "Evolve your chosen primary DPS unit to its maximum form.",
    "Farm 1000+ Trait Rerolls for a dedicated Eternal trait attempt.",
    "Successfully obtain the 0.1% Eternal trait for your main DPS unit.",
    "Max ascend your core Eternal units to unlock their full potential.",
    "Optimize your team composition to synergize with your Eternal units' strengths.",
    "Consistently farm additional rerolls and evolution materials for new Eternal unit projects."
  ]}
/>

</Section>

<Section icon={Shield} title="Frequently Asked Questions About Eternal Units">

<FAQ items={[
  {
    question: "What exactly makes a unit an 'Anime Paradox Eternal Unit'?",
    answer: "A unit becomes an 'Anime Paradox Eternal Unit' when it successfully acquires the extremely rare 0.1% 'Eternal' trait through trait rerolls. This trait grants significant stat boosts and unique abilities, transforming the unit into a powerhouse."
  },
  {
    question: "Is it worth rerolling for the Eternal trait on any unit?",
    answer: "No, it's generally not worth rerolling for the Eternal trait on just any unit. You should prioritize high-tier Mythic or Secret units that already have strong base kits and good synergy with the trait's benefits, like Udyu, Asta Devil, or S+ tier DPS units."
  },
  {
    question: "What are the best ways to farm Trait Rerolls for Eternal units?",
    answer: "The most efficient ways to farm Trait Rerolls include completing Story Milestones, participating in daily and weekly challenges, progressing through Level Milestones, and purchasing them from the Raid and Siege Mode stores. Consistency across all these sources is key."
  },
  {
    question: "Do Eternal units need specific team compositions to be effective?",
    answer: "While Eternal units are powerful on their own, they become even more effective with proper team synergy. Pairing them with support units like Idol Pop for healing and buffs, or crowd control units to group enemies, can maximize their impact in combat."
  }
]} />

</Section>
